CHART 271
This native's intellect (Mercury)
is seated in a forest (Sagittarius). Mars, Mars
Saturn, Jupiter, Rahu and the Moon Sat.

Ketu of anti-clockwise motion meets Mercury, Venus' and the Moon

around his 31st year.
